creator: freebsd@johnlevine.com
text:
This is a little nicer than grep.  I don't see how this will find ports that need the libtool archive in the build process, though.

$ ldd ./*.so*|awk '/:/ {l = $0 }
/libgcrypt/{ print l
print }'
